mapper.select: SELECT tbevEvnt.EVNT_NO, tbevEvnt.EVNT_NM, tbevEvnt.VENUE_NM, tbevEvnt.EVNT_ST_CD, tbevSchd.SCHD_NO, tbevSchd.SCHD_DT, tbevSchd.OPEN_DT, tbevSchd.TOT_SEAT_CNT FROM TBEV_EVNT tbevEvnt JOIN TBEV_SCHD tbevSchd ON tbevSchd.EVNT_NO = tbevEvnt.EVNT_NO WHERE tbevEvnt.EVNT_ST_CD = '1' ORDER BY tbevSchd.SCHD_DT

SELECT tbtrRsvSeat.SEAT_NO, tbtrRsv.USR_ID FROM TBTR_RSV tbtrRsv JOIN TBTR_RSV_SEAT tbtrRsvSeat ON tbtrRsvSeat.RSV_NO = tbtrRsv.RSV_NO LEFT JOIN TBTR_RSV cnclRsv ON cnclRsv.ORSV_NO = tbtrRsv.RSV_NO AND cnclRsv.RSV_ST_CD = '2' WHERE tbtrRsv.SCHD_NO = #{schdNo} AND tbtrRsv.RSV_ST_CD = '0' AND cnclRsv.RSV_NO IS NULL
SELECT tbevSeat.SEAT_NO, tbevSeat.SEAT_GRD_CD, tbevSeat.SEAT_PRC FROM TBEV_SEAT tbevSeat WHERE tbevSeat.SCHD_NO = #{schdNo} ORDER BY tbevSeat.SEAT_NO
SELECT tbpdPrd.PRD_NO, tbpdPrd.PRD_NM, tbpdPrd.PRD_TYPE_CD, tbpdPrd.PRD_PRC FROM TBPD_PRD tbpdPrd WHERE tbpdPrd.SCHD_NO = #{schdNo} ORDER BY tbpdPrd.PRD_NO

SELECT tbpdPrd.PRD_NO, tbpdPrd.STOCK_QTY - IFNULL(ordSum.ORD_QTY_SUM, 0) AS REMAIN_QTY FROM TBPD_PRD tbpdPrd LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tbtrOrdItem.PRD_NO, SUM(tbtrOrdItem.ORD_QTY) AS ORD_QTY_SUM FROM TBTR_ORD tbtrOrd JOIN TBTR_ORD_ITEM tbtrOrdItem ON tbtrOrdItem.ORD_NO = tbtrOrd.ORD_NO WHERE tbtrOrd.SCHD_NO = #{schdNo} GROUP BY tbtrOrdItem.PRD_NO ) ordSum ON ordSum.PRD_NO = tbpdPrd.PRD_NO WHERE tbpdPrd.SCHD_NO = #{schdNo}
